_doc: Gold dataset for the Curator voice critic. Each case is a marketing-copy sample plus, per voice rule, the findings the model returns (model_findings — frozen for deterministic replay) and the findings that SHOULD be flagged (expected). The suite drives the REAL runVoiceChecks() assembly and scores flagged-vs-gold by precision/recall/F1 — the standard critic-eval metric. A critic that cries wolf wastes operator attention, so precision is gated alongside recall. Grounding: wiki/research/2026-06-05-agent-evaluation-methodology.md §5 (critic eval).

cases.prose: Agix installs the AI foundation you own and grow. Start with a Discovery sprint and keep everything we build together.
Our platform uses RAG to surface answers from your knowledge base in milliseconds.

cases.prose: Leverage our cutting-edge RAG pipeline. Once you sign, Agix retains ownership of the deployed models. We are the synergy partner for your journey.

tone.quote: We are the synergy partner for your journey.

cases.note: Realistic critic errors: the recorded model raises a tone finding not in gold (false positive) and misses the mission/ownership violation (false negative).
